scripts.sync-env: bun -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; const env = '.env.local'; ['apps/main', 'apps/signal'].forEach(dir => { if (fs.existsSync(env)) fs.copyFileSync(env, dir + '/' + env) })"
scripts.build: bun run sync-env && bun x turbo build
scripts.build:main: bun run sync-env && bun x turbo build --filter=main
scripts.build:signal: bun run sync-env && bun x turbo build --filter=signal
scripts.dev: bun run sync-env && bun x turbo dev
scripts.dev:main: bun run sync-env && bun x turbo dev --filter=main
scripts.dev:signal: bun run sync-env && bun x turbo dev --filter=signal
scripts.lint: bun run sync-env && bun x turbo lint
scripts.type-check: bun run sync-env && bun x turbo type-check
